mapper.insert: insert into sky_take_out.setmeal ( category_id, name, price, status, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{categoryId},#{name},#{price},#{status},#{description},#{image},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})

insert.foreach: insert into sky_take_out.setmeal_dish (setmeal_id, dish_id, name, price, copies) VALUES (#{st.setmealId},#{st.dishId},#{st.name},#{st.price},#{st.copies})
